The '''Battle of Kaer Orbital Platform''' took place early on in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
Soon after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] desired that his most trusted [[General/Legends|General]], a [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] named [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]], help the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] to rebuild its droid armies.

Because of the great amount of resources—including ore, nova crystals, carbon and food—that the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] had left on their abandoned base, the [[Kaer Orbital Platform]], Tann was sent there.

==The battle==
Sev'rance Tann landed in the platform with a small force of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] and one [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|heavy hailfire droid]], together with some [[Power droid/Legends|power droids]] and [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] workers; as they began scouting they came across an abandoned command center; Tann decided to establish a base by sending a power droid to power the center and the workers established a [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]] and used its forges to form B2 super battle droids and [[Anti-Air Super Battle Droid]]s as more Geonosian workers were bred inside the command center; many [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]] tried to feed from the command center's power but were killed by Geonosian hunters as Tann scouted ahead coming across great numbers of supplies and reclaiming and powering two [[Factory/Legends|mech factories]]. Her mission was to create twenty [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]] and 20 [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droids]]. It sounded like a simple mission, but a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] taskforce under the command of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] General [[Jor Drakas]] arrived at the platform and the mission quickly turned into a battle. However, Tann's forces were able to infiltrate the Republic base and destroyed their ships, making Jor Drakas contact reinforcements from a nearby fleet. Soon, Tann's new droid army was finished and Dooku sent [[Geonosian transport]]s to ship the new forces to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] before the Republic captured and reclaimed the orbital platform.

==Aftermath==
After they escaped the station, Tann sent the DSD1 dwarf spider droids, the OG-9 homing spider droids and the heavy hailfire droid along with the Geonosian army back to Raxus Prime to reserve them for the [[Assault on Sarapin|conquest of Sarapin]] and its [[Recapture of Sarapin|defense]]. Meanwhile, Sev'rance along with the super battle droids and some [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] set course to Tatooine in a [[Hunt for the Decimator|mission]] to find the most [[Decimator (war machine)|powerful weapon]] of the Republic.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
